markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Connect a recent AI graduate with job opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Job Search:** David, a recent AI graduate, is seeking his first tech role, with a strong preference for AI in medicine and a top location choice of the Netherlands.](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [**Market Challenge:** The junior tech market is highly competitive, with Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) filtering out most AI-generated applications. Networking is the most effective strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [**Actionable Leads:** Renato provided two direct leads: Hackmed (AI in medicine, Netherlands) and Antfarm (recycling robots, Spain/NL).](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [**Next Step:** David to email Renato an updated English CV and a short bio for direct introductions to the founders of Hackmed and Antfarm.](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)

## Topics

### Job Search Context

  - [**Candidate:** David Setoain, recent AI graduate (August 2025).](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [**Goal:** First tech role to gain experience and build a career foundation.](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [**Preferred Focus:** AI in medicine, but open to other sectors.](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [**Top Location:** Netherlands, but open to other European cities (e.g., London) for the right role.](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)

### Market Challenge & Solution

  - [**Problem:** The junior tech market is extremely competitive.](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
      - [**ATS Barrier:** Companies receive hundreds of applications daily, many AI-generated, making it difficult for real candidates to be seen.](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [**Solution:** Networking is the most effective way to bypass ATS and get noticed.](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)

### Actionable Leads

  - [**Hackmed:**](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
      - [**Focus:** AI in medicine (Netherlands).](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
      - [**Connection:** Renato knows the founders and CPO.](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
      - [**Note:** Unsure if they have junior engineering roles open.](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [**Antfarm:**](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
      - [**Focus:** Recycling robots (Spain & Netherlands).](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
      - [**Connection:** Renato is an investor.](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
      - [**Note:** Recently started; potential for early-stage opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [**Growthx.ai:**](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
      - [**Fit:** No; Growthx.ai requires 10+ years of experience.](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**David:**](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
      - [Research Hackmed and Antfarm.](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
      - [Email Renato an updated English CV and a short bio (1-2 sentences).](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [**Renato:**](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
      - [Contact founders at Hackmed and Antfarm to check for junior openings.](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
      - [Connect David with relevant contacts if opportunities exist.](https://fathom.video/share/TnfRBiDt-Jd4_qKYX5bhSqjqN9C4dHsJ?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
